SEARCH
Package dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils

Class SendUtils

java.lang.Object
dev.nukecraft5419.nukelexicon.utils.SendUtils
public class SendUtils extends Object
Utility class for delivering formatted messages to players and console. Utilizes Adventure's BukkitAudiences to safely send modern Components on Spigot servers.

  • Method Details

    • sendMessage

      public static void sendMessage(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String message, net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver extraTags)
      Formats and sends a single MiniMessage string to a CommandSender.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient (Player or Console).
      message - The raw string containing MiniMessage tags.
      extraTags - Optional custom Placeholder tags to resolve (use TagResolver.empty() if none).

    • sendMessages

      public static void sendMessages(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, List<String> messages, net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver extraTags)
      Formats and sends a list of MiniMessage strings to a CommandSender.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient (Player or Console).
      messages - The list of raw strings to send.
      extraTags - Optional custom Placeholder tags to resolve (use TagResolver.empty() if none).

    • sendTranslation

      public static void sendTranslation(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver extraTags)
      Translates and sends a single message to a CommandSender based on their client language. Automatically retrieves the string from the locales folder and applies formatting.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the message (Player or Console).
      path - The YAML key path in the locale file (e.g., "messages.welcome").
      extraTags - Additional custom Placeholder tags to resolve (can be TagResolver.empty()).

    • sendTranslations

      public static void sendTranslations(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path, net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver extraTags)
      Translates and sends a list of messages to a CommandSender based on their client language. Automatically retrieves the correct string list from the locales folder and applies MiniMessage formatting and PlaceholderAPI parsing.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the messages (Player or Console).
      path - The YAML key path to the string list in the locales file (e.g., "plugin.help").
      extraTags - Optional custom Placeholder tags to resolve (use TagResolver.empty() if none).

    • log

      public static void log(String message, net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver extraTags)
      Shorthand to send a formatted message directly to the server console. Useful for startup, shutdown, or debugging logs.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to log (supports custom tags like <prefix> and colors like <green>).
      extraTags - Optional custom Placeholder tags to resolve (use TagResolver.empty() if none).

    • sendMessage

      public static void sendMessage(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String message)
      Formats and sends a single MiniMessage string to a CommandSender.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient (Player or Console).
      message - The raw string containing MiniMessage tags.

    • sendMessages

      public static void sendMessages(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, List<String> messages)
      Formats and sends a list of MiniMessage strings to a CommandSender.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient (Player or Console).
      messages - The list of raw strings to send.

    • sendTranslation

      public static void sendTranslation(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
      Translates and sends a single message to a CommandSender based on their client language.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the message (Player or Console).
      path - The YAML key path in the locale file.

    • sendTranslations

      public static void sendTranslations(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String path)
      Translates and sends a list of messages to a CommandSender based on their client language.
      Parameters:
      sender - The recipient of the messages (Player or Console).
      path - The YAML key path to the string list in the locales file.

    • log

      public static void log(String message)
      Logs a formatted message directly to the server console.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to log.
